content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — hardcoded hourly repeating "Hot deal alert" push (App/NotificationScheduler.swift:8-11) matches the marketing copy "we'll alert you EVERY HOUR ... unlimited notifications, all day long" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt), with no visible opt-in/opt-out UI or user-configurable frequency.
Pierre: Apple explicitly flags promotional push spam and requires opt-in consent plus an in-app opt-out mechanism per 4.5.4/4.5.3 — a fixed hourly marketing notification baked into code, advertised as "unlimited," is a classic pattern reviewers reject. Verify there's an in-app toggle/consent screen and let users control frequency, and tone down the "unlimited/every hour" marketing language in the description.
